channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Chief of Staff for Rep. Sessions Charged in D.C. Gun Incident
item.description: The chief of staff to Rep. Pete Sessions faces charges for bringing a pistol into a House office building in December 2025.

item.title: Delaney Hall Snack Purchases Question Hunger Strike Reports, DHS Says
item.description: DHS data shows commissary revenue tripled at Delaney Hall during the reported hunger strike, contradicting Democrats' claims of poor conditions.

item.title: Dick Morris to Newsmax: Trump's Mail Ballot Order 'Brilliant'
item.description: Political strategist Dick Morris praised President Donald Trump's executive order directing mail-in ballot oversight through the U.S. Postal Service.

item.title: Graham Platner Denies New Allegations as 'False Accusations': 'Maine, You Have My Back'
item.description: Democrat Graham Platner calls allegations politically motivated as he rallies supporters in Bar Harbor amid multiple controversies.
